message:
feat(incidents,webhook,cli): durable incident tracking, graceful webhook shutdown, and session-aware project dir resolution

Incident management:
- Add SnapshotIncident type and surface active incidents in snapshot output and digest responses
- Implement persistNormalizedIncidents to upsert incidents from aggregated signals, with SHA-256 fingerprinting for deduplication
- Auto-resolve incidents whose promoted source alert is no longer active in the normalized projection
- Generate normalizedIncidentEvents for the attention feed (opened/recurred/resolved/muted/promoted variants) with appropriate actionability and severity mapping
- Link attention events back to durable incidents via linkIncidentAttentionEvent
- Promote qualifying alerts to incidents during signal aggregation in normalize.go (injecting agent/bead associations)

Webhook manager:
- Track pending deliveries with an atomic counter; drain pending work before cancelling context on Stop
- Abandon pending retries at shutdown, moving them to the dead-letter queue to avoid goroutine leaks
- Validate webhook templates at registration time via shared parseWebhookTemplate helper
- Log dropped oldest delivery IDs when queue is full; tighten stop timeout budget to remaining wall time

CLI project-dir resolution:
- Introduce resolveAssignProjectDir/resolveProjectDirForSession helpers to centralize session-aware project root lookup, eliminating scattered os.Getwd() fallbacks across assign.go, send.go, context.go, and root.go
- Replace agentmail.NewClient(agentmail.WithProjectKey(wd)) callsites with newAgentMailClient(projectDir)
- Return proper errors when project root cannot be resolved instead of silently falling back to cwd

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 				IDs:     toIntSlice(args["file_reservation_ids"]),

+		case "file_reservation_paths":
+			call := reserveCall{
+				Agent:     toString(args["agent_name"]),
+				Project:   toString(args["project_key"]),
+				Paths:     toStringSlice(args["paths"]),
+				TTL:       toInt(args["ttl_seconds"]),
+				Exclusive: toBool(args["exclusive"]),
+				Reason:    toString(args["reason"]),
+			}
+			stub.reserveCalls = append(stub.reserveCalls, call)
+			granted := make([]map[string]interface{}, 0, len(call.Paths))
+			for i, path := range call.Paths {
+				granted = append(granted, map[string]interface{}{
+					"id":           i + 1,
+					"path_pattern": path,
+					"agent_name":   call.Agent,
+					"project_id":   1,
+					"exclusive":    call.Exclusive,
+					"reason":       call.Reason,
+					"expires_ts":   "2026-02-01T01:00:00Z",
+					"created_ts":   "2026-02-01T00:00:00Z",
+				})
+			}
+			writeResponse(map[string]interface{}{
+				"granted":   granted,
+				"conflicts": []map[string]interface{}{},
+			})
 		case "renew_file_reservations":
 			stub.renewCalls = append(stub.renewCalls, renewCall{
 				Agent:         toString(args["agent_name"]),
